_meta.provenance: Proposed by Code from the user's last-90d Hevy history (2026-05-26..07-13, 51 distinct titles). LLM-proposed; every entry is PENDING human confirmation (DECISIONS_LOG #NEXT). Flip `source` to 'human_confirmed' per row at confirm-time — the seeder stamps confirmed_at then.
_meta.how_to_use: Keyed by exact Hevy title (byte-exact — note U+2011/U+2013 in some titles). seed_exercise_region_tags.py resolves title -> hevy_exercise_templates.id (default-wins) and upserts. region_key is validated fail-closed against engine/taxonomy.py.
_meta.review_flags: Entries carrying a `note` are genuine judgment calls — confirm the region choice before seeding.

tags.title: Bulgarian Split Squat
tags.note: keyword also fired `squat` — dropped; this is single-leg, not a bilateral squat

tags.title: Rack Pull
tags.note: keyword matched NOTHING (false negative) — genuine loaded hinge was unseen

tags.title: B‑Stance RDL
tags.note: title carries U+2011 non-breaking hyphen; b-stance = staggered/quasi-unilateral

tags.title: Face Pull
tags.note: scapular/rear-delt; horizontal_pull is the closest pattern — confirm

tags.title: Straight Arm Lat Pulldown (Cable)
tags.note: lat isolation, not a true vertical pull — secondary; confirm

tags.title: Cable Twist (Down to up)
tags.note: keyword matched NOTHING (false negative) — genuine loaded rotation was unseen

tags.title: Copenhagen Plank (Short Lever)
tags.note: CORRECTION: keyword tagged trunk_stability_sagittal; this is frontal-plane adductor/anti-lateral-flexion work. Primary region is a human-confirm call (frontal_single_leg_stability vs anti_lateral_flexion).

tags.title: Plank
tags.note: user has logged side-planks under this title too (see workout notes) — confirm this instance is a front plank

tags.title: Side Plank
tags.note: CORRECTION: keyword tagged trunk_stability_sagittal; side plank is frontal anti-lateral-flexion

tags.title: Cable Crunch
tags.note: spinal flexion, not anti-movement stability — secondary; confirm or leave untagged

tags.title: Shoulder External Rotation
tags.note: CORRECTION: keyword tagged `rotation` (a _RADICULAR_BLOCKS region) via substring — this is rotator-cuff isometric work, NOT loaded trunk rotation. Taxonomy has no cuff region; shoulder_mobility(secondary) neutralises the false positive. Confirm or leave to a future taxonomy revision.

tags.title: Shoulder Internal Rotation
tags.note: CORRECTION: same false-`rotation` neutralisation as external rotation

tags.title: Calf Extension (Machine)
tags.note: plantarflexion strength; taxonomy has only ankle_df (dorsiflexion mobility). Matches the legacy keyword convention (calf->ankle_df) — imperfect; confirm

tags.title: Standing Calf Raise (Machine)
tags.note: as Calf Extension — plantarflexion has no clean region

_untagged_taxonomy_gap.reason: These logged movements have NO clean region in Capability_Taxonomy_v0, which is a movement-PATTERN + capacity vocabulary, not an accessory/isolation one. Left UNTAGGED deliberately — the keyword fallback returns [] for all of them (benign: no wrong region, just a logged coverage-gap hit). Forcing a tag would pollute the region signal. This is the OPEN_QUESTION for Luke (see OPEN_QUESTIONS): accept benign empties, add an accessory sentinel, or extend the taxonomy — the adductor/abductor gap is pes-anserine-relevant.
arm_shoulder_isolation_NO_REGION: Single Arm Rear Delt Cable Fly
